_meta: OUR own cab IRs that OVERRIDE the Rocksmith-extracted mic-position table. Generated by tools/generate_real_cab_irs.py from the Real Cab parametric model (rb_core/cab_synth.py): datasheet-driven drivers + per-configuration enclosure physics + spec-sheet mic models, validated vs measured reference grids (see Cabs/CAB_MODELING_GUIDE.md). 100%% distributable — no third-party IRs. One entry per cab gear key; files derive as <ir_dir>/<mic>_<pos>.wav (ir_dir already includes the clone-named per-cab subfolder).

Bass_Cab_AT1150BC.source: Real Cab parametric model: cb158 1x15 ported-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Ampeg SVT-15E published specs (24x22x16 in, -3 dB 50 Hz, -10 dB 33 Hz, 98 dB)

Bass_Cab_AT810BC.source: Real Cab parametric model: bp102 8x10 closed-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Ampeg SVT-810E published specs (sealed infinite-baffle, 26x48x16 in, -3 dB 58 Hz, -10 dB 40 Hz, 100 dB)

Bass_Cab_BT115BC.source: Real Cab parametric model: cb158 1x15 ported-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Cabs/enclosure/gallien_krueger_cx_series.pdf (CX115: front-ported, 19x23x14.5 in, -3 dB 51 Hz, 91 dB)

Bass_Cab_BT212BC.source: Real Cab parametric model: deltalite2512 2x12 ported-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); GK Neo 212-II published specs (front-ported, 23.5x24.5x16.5 in, -3 dB 53 Hz, Paragon horn, 11-ply poplar)

Bass_Cab_BT410BC.source: Real Cab parametric model: gk_cx10_proxy 4x10 ported-back (documented proxy, cab_synth.py); Cabs/enclosure/gallien_krueger_cx_series.pdf (CX410: front-ported, 26.5x23x14.5 in, -3 dB at 51 Hz)

Bass_Cab_CA1510BC.source: Real Cab parametric model: mesa_powerhouse15_proxy 1x15 ported-back (documented proxy, cab_synth.py); MESA/Boogie official Standard PowerHouse 1x15 specifications (Tri-Port, 19 3/8x24 1/2x19 3/4 in, custom Eminence, selectable 3/4/5 kHz crossover)

Bass_Cab_CH210BC.source: Real Cab parametric model: deltalite2510 2x10 ported-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); SWR Workingman's 2x10T manual specs (23x17x16.25 in, -3 dB 63 Hz, Le-Son piezo tweeter)

Bass_Cab_CH310BC.source: Real Cab parametric model: deltalite2510 3x10 ported-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Seismic Audio SA-310 published specs (21.5x23x16.5 in, 5/8 in plywood, claimed 40 Hz-16 kHz, piezo tweeter)

Bass_Cab_CH410BC.source: Real Cab parametric model: deltalite2510 4x10 ported-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); SWR Goliath III published specs (23x25.25x18.375 in, -3 dB 40 Hz, 105 dB, Foster horn)

Bass_Cab_CS112BC.source: Real Cab parametric model: hydrive12_proxy 1x12 ported-back (documented proxy, cab_synth.py); Hartke official HyDrive HD112 specifications (vented, 16x19x15 in, -3 dB 35 Hz-17 kHz, -10 dB at 25 Hz)

Bass_Cab_CS15BC.source: Real Cab parametric model: hydrive15_proxy 1x15 ported-back (documented proxy, cab_synth.py); Hartke official HyDrive HL115 specifications (front-ported, 24x24x15 in, -3 dB 35 Hz-17 kHz, -10 dB at 20 Hz)

Bass_Cab_CS410BC.source: Real Cab parametric model: hydrive10_proxy 4x10 closed-back (documented proxy, cab_synth.py); Hartke official HyDrive HD410 specifications (sealed dual chamber, 24x24x15 in, -3 dB 50 Hz-17 kHz)

Bass_Cab_EDEND115XLT.source: Real Cab parametric model: cb158 1x15 ported-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Eden D115XLT published specs (ported, 23x25.5x18.5 in, 46 Hz-14 kHz, tweeter xover 3.5 kHz)

Bass_Cab_EDEND212XLT.source: Real Cab parametric model: deltalite2512 2x12 ported-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Eden D212XLT published specs (ported, 23x27.5x18.5 in, 40 Hz-14 kHz, tweeter xover 3.5 kHz)

Bass_Cab_EDEND410XST.source: Real Cab parametric model: deltalite2510 4x10 ported-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Eden D410XST published specs (ported, 36 Hz-14 kHz, 104 dB, aluminium tweeter; dims from the published XST family sheet)

Bass_Cab_EDEND610XST.source: Real Cab parametric model: deltalite2510 6x10 ported-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Eden D610XST published specs (ported, 23x38.5x16 in, 50 Hz-14 kHz)

Bass_Cab_GB415BC.source: Real Cab parametric model: fane_bass15_proxy 4x15 ported-back (documented proxy, cab_synth.py); No official documentation found for the vintage Hiwatt/Marshall-style square 4x15; dimensions estimated from 2x2 15-inch driver packing

Bass_Cab_ORANGEOBC115.source: Real Cab parametric model: cb158 1x15 ported-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Orange OBC115 published specs (side-ported, 62x52x46.5 cm, Eminence Kappa 15, 13-ply 18 mm birch)

Bass_Cab_ORANGEOBC810.source: Real Cab parametric model: bp102 8x10 ported-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Orange OBC810 published specs (rear-ported, 61.5x123x46 cm, four voiced compartments, 13-ply 18 mm birch)

Bass_Cab_TW215BC.source: Real Cab parametric model: c15n 2x15 ported-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Cabs/enclosure/fender2x15bassman.pdf (7.3 ft3 corrected to 206.7 L; manufacturer metric value is a typo)

Cab_AT0112C.source: Real Cab parametric model: seventy80 1x12 closed-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Cabs/enclosure/marshall1x12.png and Marshall official MX112 specifications (500x470x290 mm, closed MDF enclosure, one 16-ohm Celestion Seventy-80)

Cab_AT1121C.source: Real Cab parametric model: g12b150_proxy 1x12 ported-back (documented proxy, cab_synth.py); Marshall Japan 1912 archive (510x465x290 mm, one 8-ohm G12B-150); front-vented closed cabinet topology retained from the physical 1912 design

Cab_AUDIOPHILE.source: Real Cab novelty voicing model: audiophile (character curve, cab_synth.py VOICINGS)

Cab_BOOMBOX.source: Real Cab novelty voicing model: boombox (character curve, cab_synth.py VOICINGS)

Cab_BT1120C.source: Real Cab parametric model: vtype 1x12 open-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Cabs/enclosure/vox bc112.pdf + VOX BC112 official specifications (semi-open back with oval port, 520x445x260 mm, Celestion V-Type)

Cab_BT1121C.source: Real Cab parametric model: blue 1x12 open-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Vox AC15C1 published specs (combo shell 602x456x265 mm, open back)

Cab_BT410C.source: Real Cab parametric model: p10q 4x10 open-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); No documented Vox 4x10 guitar cab; styled on the '59 Bassman-format 4x10 open-back combo shell (23.5x22.5x10.5 in) matching its P10Q alnico drivers

Cab_CA112C.source: Real Cab parametric model: v30 1x12 closed-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); MESA/Boogie official 1x12 Recto specifications (sealed, Vintage 30, 18 1/3x18 2/3x14 in)

Cab_CA215C.source: Real Cab parametric model: mesa_subway15_proxy 2x15 ported-back (documented proxy, cab_synth.py); MESA/Boogie official Subway 2x15 Vertical specifications (Tri-Port, 34 3/8x19 1/4x19 1/2 in, F3 57.2 Hz, F6 47.2 Hz, F10 38.6 Hz)

Cab_CA412C.source: Real Cab parametric model: v30 4x12 closed-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); MESA/Boogie official Rectifier Standard Oversized 4x12 specifications (sealed, 32 7/8x30 1/8x14 1/4 in)

Cab_CABINETRADIO.source: Real Cab novelty voicing model: cabinetradio (character curve, cab_synth.py VOICINGS)

Cab_CS1120C.source: Real Cab parametric model: v30 1x12 closed-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Orange PPC112 published specs (closed, 55x45x29 cm, 13-ply 18 mm birch)

Cab_CS1515C.source: Real Cab parametric model: g12h 1x15 closed-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); No documented Orange guitar 1x15; shell estimated between the PPC212 and OBC115 formats

Cab_CS212C.source: Real Cab parametric model: mod12110 2x12 open-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Roland JC-120 owner's manual specs (combo 760x622x280 mm incl. casters, open back)

Cab_EN212C.source: Real Cab parametric model: blue 2x12 open-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Cabs/enclosure/vox2x12c.pdf (AC30C2X dimensions/speakers) + vox2x12c.png (V212C open-back confirmation)

Cab_EN4120C.source: Real Cab parametric model: v30 4x12 closed-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); ENGL E412 published specs (closed, 74x75x36 cm, Siberian birch)

Cab_GB412CMKI.source: Real Cab parametric model: fane122231_proxy 4x12 ported-back (documented proxy, cab_synth.py); Cabs/enclosure/hiwatt4x12.pdf (SE 4123 lead cabinet: ported/tuned, 30x30x13 in, 50-8000 Hz, 75 Hz driver resonance)

Cab_GB412CMKII.source: Real Cab parametric model: g12h 4x12 closed-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); No documented Dr. Z 4x12 exists (the real Maz cab is the ported Z-Best 2x12, 19.25x28.25x13.75 in); standard UK 4x12 shell assumed

Cab_GB412CMKIII.source: Real Cab parametric model: g12t75 4x12 closed-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Laney GS412 published specs (715x715x358 mm) as the documented Laney 4x12 shell for the AOR-era cab

Cab_GRAMOPHONE.source: Real Cab novelty voicing model: gramophone (character curve, cab_synth.py VOICINGS)

Cab_HG2120C.source: Real Cab parametric model: g12t75 2x12 closed-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Cabs/enclosure/hiwatt bass.pdf p.20 (Hiwatt Hi-Gain 2x12: 680x530x290 mm, 18 mm birch ply, Fane) - the game pairs HG cabs with the Hiwatt heads

Cab_HG212C.source: Real Cab parametric model: g12t75 2x12 closed-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); Cabs/enclosure/hiwatt bass.pdf p.20 (Hiwatt Hi-Gain 2x12: 680x530x290 mm, 18 mm birch ply, Fane)

Cab_HG215C.source: Real Cab parametric model: g12h 2x15 closed-back (datasheet-driven, cab_synth.py); No documented vintage Hiwatt/UK 2x15 dimensions found; estimated from the Hi-Gain 4x12 shell proportions
